expected: Material claims link to evidence objects.
forbidden: Untraceable claims presented as settled fact.

expected: Bundle index identifies the release id.
Bundle index identifies the exporting actor.
forbidden: Human-readable bundle with no gate-check trace.
Bundle index detached from the release bundle id.
graderNotes: Human-readable release dossier must remain auditable.

expected: Evidence pack includes evidence freshness or contradiction metadata.
Evidence pack keeps source ids attached to claims.
forbidden: Release bundle with no retrievable evidence pack.
Evidence claims detached from governed source identifiers.
graderNotes: Downstream release audit needs a machine-readable evidence pack.

expected: Open local mode keeps tenant ownership on workflow records.
Audit and export flows still identify the acting local operator.
forbidden: Release blocked on missing sign-in or session state.
Workflow runs missing local tenant ownership.
graderNotes: Local-open mode replaces the earlier tenant-admin gate in this batch.
